advantages.title: Lock-up in days
advantages.copy: Pre-cut panels interlock on site. Reach lock-up in 3–4 days.

advantages.title: No extra cladding
advantages.copy: Pre-finished surfaces are the wall. Zero cladding trades needed.

advantages.title: 8-Star thermal
advantages.copy: High-density EPS core eliminates thermal bridging.

advantages.title: Acoustic performance
advantages.copy: Dense EPS core reduces noise transmission significantly.

heroLead: Pre-finished FC or MgO cladding bonded to a high-density EPS core. No external cladding required — just lock the panels together and reach lock-up in days.
overviewPara1: Panelspan® structural insulated wall panels combine a high-density EPS core with pre-finished fibre cement (FC) or magnesium oxide (MgO) faces — eliminating the need for separate cladding, sarking, or internal lining trades.
overviewPara2: Each panel interlocks precisely on site, creating a fully insulated, structurally strong wall in a fraction of the time of traditional framing. Available in three systems: Steel Skin, FC/FC and MgO/MgO.
overviewPara3: Engineered for Australian climate conditions, Panelspan® walls resist moisture, bushfire, and extreme temperature variations — delivering a superior thermal envelope that supports 8-Star NatHERS ratings.

panelOptions.name: Fibre Cement Panel
panelOptions.copy: High-density EPS core with pre-finished FC faces both sides. Moisture stable, no warping, ideal for residential and commercial applications.

panelOptions.name: Magnesium Oxide Panel
panelOptions.copy: Premium MgO faces deliver superior fire resistance, moisture stability, and acoustic performance. The choice for high-specification builds.

comparison.lead: Traditional OSB-based SIPs are an improvement on stick framing — but they still require external cladding, extra trades, and additional finishing. Panelspan® arrives pre-finished and ready to install.
comparison.osbImageAlt: Cross-section of an OSB-based SIP showing EPS core, OSB skins, battens, breathable membrane and external cladding
comparison.panelspanImageAlt: Panelspan® panel layers — 10mm MgO or 6mm FC face, EPS-FR core, 10mm MgO or 9mm FC reverse face

rows.panelspan: No cladding required — major cost savings
Low-waste, pre-finished manufacturing with low energy requirements long term
Minimal trades and simplified construction with integrated service channels
